extraction.one_line_summary: IGUITA Sergio won from reduced group after RUBIO Einer's solo move caught inside final 300m by PLAPP Luke's chase.
tactical_patterns: RUBIO Einer attacked past teammate RODRIGUEZ Oscar on penultimate climb, demonstrating Movistar's willingness to sacrifice breakaway rider for stage hunt.
PLAPP Luke single-handedly neutralized RUBIO's 1-minute solo advantage in headwind finish, revealing Australian's unexpected firepower in stage races.
Jumbo-Visma controlled 4000m elevation stage entirely for DENNIS despite having no GC threat, showing resources committed to protecting small time gaps.
IGUITA's winning acceleration came left-hand side of road inside final kilometer after PLAPP caught RUBIO, exploiting tactical confusion.

rider_signals.RUBIO Einer: positive: attacked past own teammate on penultimate climb and held solo advantage until final 300m despite headwind
rider_signals.PLAPP Luke: positive: Australian champion chased down 1-minute gap solo to protect DENNIS, showing GC-level climbing strength
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: dropped from front group on queen stage as defending champion, concerning form signal
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: positive: took second place as IGUITA's teammate, Bora 1-2 suggests deliberate tactical coordination
rider_signals.SCOINS Toms: positive: won KOM classification by securing points from breakaway before being dropped, smart tactical calculation
